title: Campus Trends: OpenAI Infrastructure and Spending
description: Recent reports highlight OpenAI's massive cloud spending plans and infrastructure developments in Effingham County.

sources.title: Exclusive | OpenAI’s Planned Cloud Spending Hits $750 Billion as Computing Efforts Ramp Up
Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
Southern Co unit signs 25-year power deal with OpenAI

sections.heading: Cloud Spending Plans
paragraphs: According to the WSJ, OpenAI’s planned cloud spending has reached $750 billion as computing efforts ramp up.

sections.heading: Infrastructure Projects
paragraphs: OpenAI has released information regarding building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community, according to a post by OpenAI.

sections.heading: Energy Partnerships
paragraphs: A unit of Southern Co has signed a 25-year power deal with OpenAI, as reported by 93.3 The Drive.

faq.q: What is the status of OpenAI's cloud spending?
faq.a: According to the WSJ, OpenAI’s planned cloud spending has hit $750 billion as computing efforts ramp up.
OpenAI states they are building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community.

faq.q: Who is providing power for these efforts?
faq.a: 93.3 The Drive reports that a Southern Co unit has signed a 25-year power deal with OpenAI.

news_coverage.title: Exclusive | OpenAI’s Planned Cloud Spending Hits $750 Billion as Computing Efforts Ramp Up
Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
Southern Co unit signs 25-year power deal with OpenAI

review.notes: rules: all rules checks passed | reviewer(qwen-max): The article is well-structured and grounded in the provided facts, with all claims attributed to their sources. The only minor issue is a slight exaggeration in the cloud spending amount, which might be considered dramatic but does not cross into clickbait territory.
